subject: Fermi  trigger No 641601187: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin, 
V.Vladimirov, D. Vlasenko, I.Gorbunov, D.Zimnukhov, V.Senik, T.Pogrosheva,

(Lomonosov Moscow State University, SAI, Physics Department),

(Observatorio Astronomico Felix Aguilar OAFA),

(The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias),

(South African Astronomical Observatory),

O.A. Gres, N.M. Budnev, O.Ershova 
(Irkutsk State University, API),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB210501.94 (trigger No 641601187,13h 03m 36.00s , +46d 15m 36.0s, R=7.58) errorbox  208 sec after notice time and 234 sec after trigger time at 2021-05-01 22:36:57 UT, with upper limit up to  19.0 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 32 deg. The sun  altitude  is -28.2 deg. 

MASTER-Tavrida robotic telescope  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, SAI Crimea astronomical station) started inspect of the Fermi GRB210501.94 errorbox  212 sec after notice time and 238 sec after trigger time at 2021-05-01 22:37:00 UT, with upper limit up to  18.7 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 26 deg. The sun  altitude  is -29.3 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 71 deg., longitude l = 115 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1605248

We obtain a following upper limits.
